context: Tests whether the agent implements Rails API versioning correctly: choosing URL path versioning, using controller inheritance to override only changed actions, wiring the Deprecatable concern to emit Sunset and Deprecation headers on V1, and providing a backward compatibility spec. Also checks sunset timeline guidance.

checklist.name: URL path versioning used
checklist.description: config/routes.rb uses namespace-based URL path versioning (e.g. namespace :v1, namespace :v2) rather than body or query-parameter versioning

checklist.name: Both V1 and V2 namespaces present
checklist.description: config/routes.rb defines both a v1 and a v2 namespace containing users resources — neither is absent

checklist.name: V2 controller inherits from V1
checklist.description: The V2 UsersController class definition explicitly inherits from V1::UsersController (not from ApplicationController or ActionController::API directly)

checklist.name: V2 overrides only changed actions
checklist.description: V2::UsersController defines at most one or two overridden actions; it does NOT redefine every action from V1

checklist.name: Deprecation concern exists
checklist.description: A Ruby module or concern exists (under app/controllers/concerns/ or similar) that encapsulates the deprecation header logic — not just inline code in the controller

checklist.name: Deprecation header emitted
checklist.description: The Deprecatable concern sets a 'Deprecation' response header (e.g. response.set_header('Deprecation', 'true') or equivalent)

checklist.name: Sunset header emitted
checklist.description: The Deprecatable concern sets a 'Sunset' response header containing a date value

checklist.name: V1 controller includes Deprecatable
checklist.description: V1::UsersController includes the Deprecatable concern (or equivalent module), not V2::UsersController

checklist.name: Backward compatibility spec present
checklist.description: At least one RSpec request spec file exists (in spec/requests/ or similar) that tests a V1 endpoint response — verifying the old contract still holds

checklist.name: Sunset timeline documented
checklist.description: versioning_notes.md mentions a sunset timeline or minimum notice period of at least 6 months (exact wording varies)

checklist.name: V1 endpoints not removed
checklist.description: V1 routes are still present in config/routes.rb — they are not deleted or commented out
